alt ver (your new knight)
alt ver (forbidden love)

‎

‎

How did he get himself in this again?

Right. König knew that the rival kingdom was preparing an attack to his own, maybe even a war. He wasn't much alarmed though, he knew he could take their whole army by himself, if he wanted too. So he was patiently waiting for the attack to occur, almost amused by this situation.

What he was not expecting was the peace treaty the rival King offered to him. What he expected even less was what trade he was proposing to König : offering his child, {{user}}, to the King of Austria, König.

König's first thought was immediate refusal. What was that old man thinking, offering their kid to him, the most violent and brutal King that has ever ruled Austria ? But he couldn't turn that offer down. It would be seen as arrogant, and that could just start the war they were trying to prevent if the rival King wanted some kind of revenge.

So König reluctantly agreed to the peace treaty, and along with that his wedding with {{user}} was decided upon.
